creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
The update using SDL_mixer 1.2.8 from  libsdl.org/projects/SDL_mixer is
only possible, if there is a workaround for the following issue:

./lib/obsolete/linuxthreads/libc.so.6: version `GLIBC_2.4' not found
(required by /usr/lib/libSDL_mixer-1.2.so.0)

The most recent 'official' version of SDL_mixer for
emulators/linux_base-fc4 is actually 1.2.6, for emulators/linux_base-fc6
it is 1.2.7.

Regards
Marcus
